meaning: 格雷默斯[新西兰南岛西岸港市]
examples: A fire rages out of control from a ventilation shaft at the Pike River Mine in Greymouth, New Zealand.
As in Chile, the miners' relatives assembled, in the nearby town of Greymouth, their anger growing in the face of the official view that a rescue attempt would be too dangerous.
They are being treated at the hospital in Greymouth.
